title: 2007-2011 Toyota Camry Low Beam Headlight Bulb Replacement Instructions
description: Replace the low beam headlight bulb on a 2007 to 2011 Toyota Camry with an H11 bulb, including coolant reservoir cap removal for right-side access.
tips: On the right side of the vehicle, remove the coolant overflow tank cap and reposition the hose to gain more working space.
Rotate the bulb counterclockwise (viewed from the rear) to remove it from the housing.
Avoid touching the glass of the new H11 bulb to prevent premature failure.
Press the tab on the connector to release the bulb from its electrical connector.
Twist the new bulb clockwise (viewed from the rear) until it stops when installing.
Push the connector in until it clicks to confirm a secure electrical connection.
Wipe off any coolant spilled during the process before closing the hood.
